headline: Skilled Worker minimum salary raised to £41,700
summary: The UK Home Office updated the Immigration Rules to raise the general Skilled Worker salary threshold from £38,700 to £41,700, effective in three weeks. Going rates for several SOC codes were also revised upward. Sponsors must meet the higher of the two for any new Certificate of Sponsorship.
change_excerpt: The minimum general salary threshold for the Skilled Worker route is increased to £41,700 per year, or the going rate for the occupation, whichever is higher.

headline: H-1B registration fee increased; new beneficiary-centric selection confirmed
summary: USCIS confirmed the beneficiary-centric selection process for the next H-1B cap season and published a revised registration fee. Each unique beneficiary now counts once regardless of the number of registrations submitted on their behalf.
change_excerpt: Registrations will be selected by unique beneficiary rather than by registration, and the registration fee is revised effective for the upcoming fiscal year.

headline: Netherlands highly skilled migrant salary criteria indexed for new year
summary: The IND published the indexed gross monthly salary criteria for the highly skilled migrant scheme. Both the 30-and-over band and the under-30 band increased, alongside the reduced criterion for recent graduates.
change_excerpt: The required gross monthly salary for highly skilled migrants aged 30 and over is adjusted upward in line with annual indexation.

headline: Express Entry adds new category-based draw for STEM occupations
summary: IRCC announced an additional category-based Express Entry round targeting selected STEM occupations, with a lower CRS cut-off than recent general draws. Candidates in eligible NOC codes should ensure profiles are current.
change_excerpt: A category-based selection round will invite candidates with eligible STEM work experience in upcoming draws.

headline: Singapore Employment Pass qualifying salary rises for financial sector
summary: MOM raised the Employment Pass qualifying salary, with a higher floor for the financial services sector and an age-adjusted progression. COMPASS framework point requirements remain unchanged for now.
change_excerpt: The qualifying salary for new Employment Pass applications is increased, with a higher threshold applied to the financial services sector.

headline: Australia updates Core Skills Occupation List
summary: The Department of Home Affairs released a revised Core Skills Occupation List affecting eligibility for the Skills in Demand visa. Several occupations were added and a handful removed.
change_excerpt: The Core Skills Occupation List has been revised, changing eligibility for nominated occupations under the Skills in Demand visa.

headline: Germany expands Opportunity Card points criteria
summary: BAMF published expanded criteria for the Chancenkarte (Opportunity Card), adjusting how points are awarded for language skills and prior residence. Intended to broaden access for skilled non-EU workers.
change_excerpt: Points criteria for the Opportunity Card are adjusted, including revised weighting for German language proficiency.

headline: UAE adjusts Golden Visa eligibility documentation
summary: GDRFA updated the supporting-document checklist for certain Golden Visa categories, clarifying attestation requirements for foreign qualifications.
change_excerpt: Documentation requirements for selected Golden Visa categories have been clarified, including attestation of foreign qualifications.

headline: UK abolishes non-dom regime; new residence-based rules confirmed
summary: HMRC confirmed the timeline to replace the remittance-basis non-dom regime with a residence-based system. Transitional provisions apply for existing arrangements; payroll and assignment cost projections should be reviewed.
change_excerpt: The remittance basis of taxation is replaced by a residence-based regime, with transitional rules for existing non-domiciled individuals.

headline: DOL revises prevailing wage determination guidance
summary: The Office of Foreign Labor Certification revised guidance on prevailing wage determinations affecting PERM and H-1B Labor Condition Applications. Processing-time expectations were also updated.
change_excerpt: Guidance on prevailing wage determinations is revised, affecting Labor Condition Applications and PERM filings.

headline: Ireland updates Critical Skills Occupations List
summary: The Critical Skills Occupations List was revised, adding several technology and healthcare roles eligible for the Critical Skills Employment Permit.
change_excerpt: The Critical Skills Occupations List has been amended to include additional eligible occupations.

headline: EU Blue Card minimum salary ratios updated across member states
summary: The European Commission published updated reference figures used by member states to set EU Blue Card salary thresholds, which several states will adopt for the coming year.
change_excerpt: Reference salary figures underpinning EU Blue Card thresholds are updated for member-state adoption.
